title: Create: Northstar
description: Inspired by Micdoodle's Galacticraft, Northstar seeks to return players to the stars with the power of Create and Geckolib.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/NN49_IDSn0k" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## This mod requires Create, Geckolib, and Forge!

# Welcome to Northstar!

Explore the vastness of space and all it has to offer!



Inspired by Micdoodle's Galacticraft, Northstar introduces a brand new, complex rocketry system, an astronomy system,  4 new worlds to explore, 14 new mobs, and much more.

Please keep in mind that this mod is a big work in progress! If you encounter any bugs, please report them!

Additionally, please remember that I am only one person, so please be patient when it comes to updates, and don't expect a fabric port anytime soon.

Regardless, I sincerely appreciate that you would check out my mod. I've spent far too long working on this...

For a more complex rundown of what this mod adds and how it works, go [here, to the wiki.](https://github.com/lightning2401/northstar/wiki)

And if you need help figuring things out, [join the discord!](https://discord.gg/M2grVQApwm)

### // Warning! This mod has not been tested in multiplayer, so use multiplayer at your own risk!

If you want to support this mod, [please consider donating.](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=LANF5F9LWZDXG)
Donating is **NOT** required, but it does significantly help out.
